Text: Cows can smell you up to 10 km away!
Cows have a field of vision of almost 360 degrees!
cowsay is a program that generates ASCII art pictures of a cow with a message!
Dairy cows need to eat between 25 and 50kg of food every day!
A cow produces 200 liters of saliva every day!
The first cow on record to use a tool is named Veronika!
Why do cows have hooves instead of feet? Because they lactose.
The spherical cow is a humorous metaphor for highly simplified scientific models of complex phenomena
There are over 1000 recognized cow breeds!
The average sleep time of a domestic cow is about 4 hours a day!
